testcase.name: createUserTest

failure.message: Cannot serialize object because no JSON serializer found in classpath. Please put Jackson (Databind), Gson, Johnzon, or Yasson in the classpath.

testcase.failure: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Cannot serialize object because no JSON serializer found in classpath. Removed 29 stack frames
